overview: Annamacharya Institute of Technology and Sciences, Kadapa (AITS Kadapa), officially states that it was established in 2010 under the Annamacharya Educational Trust at Utukur in C.K. Dinne mandal. The college positions itself around quality technical education for students of the Rayalaseema region and highlights its rural access mission, teaching and learning center, and placement support cell.
accreditation: AICTE approved; affiliated to JNTUA; NAAC accredited.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - Civil, Mechanical, EEE, ECE, CSE, AI and Data Science
M.Tech - Structural Engineering, Thermal Engineering, VLSI System Design, EPS, CSE
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Contact admissions for the latest fee structure

admissions.admissionProcess: The official site uses EAPCET, ECET, PGECET, ICET, and PolyCET codes for its admission workflows and also publishes institute-level admissions information for the various programs offered on campus.
admissions.importantDates: Admission schedules are published on the official AITS Kadapa website alongside the yearly APSCHE and diploma counseling notifications.

facilities: Academic calendar and exam cell support
campus.specialNote: The official site frames AITS Kadapa as a college created to expand professional education access for backward rural areas of Rayalaseema.

contact.address: Utukur (P), C.K. Dinne (V&M), Kadapa, Andhra Pradesh, India
